mapper.select: select chunk_id, project_id, source_type, source_id, chunk_index, content, vector_id, create_time, update_time from novel_rag_chunk where project_id = #{projectId} order by chunk_id asc
mapper.delete: delete from novel_rag_chunk where project_id = #{projectId} and source_type = #{sourceType} and source_id = #{sourceId}
mapper.insert: insert into novel_rag_chunk (project_id, source_type, source_id, chunk_index, content, create_time) values (#{projectId}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{chunkIndex}, #{content}, sysdate())
